title: Spicy Bhuna Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful and spicy Indian-inspired rice dish, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until golden brown.
Add the Bhuna curry powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Dutch rice to the pan and stir to coat with the curry powder mixture.
Add the water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook until the rice is tender.
Add the blanched cauliflower to the cooked rice and stir to combine.
Serve hot and garnish with additional onions if desired.
